feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Yangtze river floods prompt massive evacuations in central China

link.title: Yangtze river floods prompt massive evacuations in central China

entry.content: Critics blame the disaster on rampant overdevelopment and poor water conservancies policies.View on euronews
entry.summary: Critics blame the disaster on rampant overdevelopment and poor water conservancies policies.View on euronews

entry.title: Girl Runs Away Terrified on Seeing Spider and Faceplants to the Floor

link.title: Girl Runs Away Terrified on Seeing Spider and Faceplants to the Floor

entry.content: This girl sat on the couch with her fiance and pet dogs, watching TV. Suddenly, she spotted a spider dangling in front of her face. She freaked out and ran away. However, she slipped and faceplanted to the floor. She got back up and flailed her arms, trying to shake off the bug from herself.
entry.summary: This girl sat on the couch with her fiance and pet dogs, watching TV. Suddenly, she spotted a spider dangling in front of her face. She freaked out and ran away. However, she slipped and faceplanted to the floor. She got back up and flailed her arms, trying to shake off the bug from herself.

entry.title: Duterte allows ‘limited’ face-to-face classes in low-risk areas

link.title: Duterte allows ‘limited’ face-to-face classes in low-risk areas

entry.content: Despite the consistent increase in cases President Rodrigo Duterte allows limited" face-to-face classes in low-risk areas or those under the modified general community quarantine. Full story:
entry.summary: Despite the consistent increase in cases President Rodrigo Duterte allows limited" face-to-face classes in low-risk areas or those under the modified general community quarantine. Full story:

entry.title: Surat constable Sunita Yadav on sick leave, probe ordered

link.title: Surat constable Sunita Yadav on sick leave, probe ordered

entry.content: The transfer of a woman constable for stopping a son of Gujarat MLA and his two friends, who were driving around in Surat during curfew hours on Wednesday, has triggered a massive controversy, with the episode being seen as the police buckling under political pressure. A probe has been ordered into the incident. Watch the video to know.
entry.summary: The transfer of a woman constable for stopping a son of Gujarat MLA and his two friends, who were driving around in Surat during curfew hours on Wednesday, has triggered a massive controversy, with the episode being seen as the police buckling under political pressure. A probe has been ordered into the incident. Watch the video to know.

entry.title: Hariyali Teej 2020: 23 जुलाई 2020 हरियाली तीज शुभ मुहूर्त Hariyali Teej Shubh Muhurat Boldsky

link.title: Hariyali Teej 2020: 23 जुलाई 2020 हरियाली तीज शुभ मुहूर्त Hariyali Teej Shubh Muhurat Boldsky

entry.content:
Hariyali Teej 2020 Date: Typically a festival that is celebrated by women in some of the northern states in the country — like Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar and Jharkhand — Hariyali Teej is one part of the three major teej festivals that is celebrated in the country, the other two being Kajari Teej and Hartalika Teej.According to Drik Panchang, Hariyali Teej falls on the shukla paksha tritiya in the Shravana month, and usually two days before Nag Panchami. This year, it will be celebrated on July 23, which is a Thursday. The days is dedicated to Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, and throughout the month and especially on the day, devotees fast.
हरियाली तीज सावन महीने के सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पर्व में से एक है. सौंदर्य और प्रेम के इस पर्व को श्रावणी तीज भी कहते हैं. हरियाली तीज के दिन महिलाएं अपने पति की लम्बी उम्र और सुख समृद्धि के लिए व्रत रखती हैं. इस दिन महिलाएं पूरी श्रद्धा से भगवान शिव-पार्वती की पूजा करती हैं. हरियाली तीज भगवान शिव और मां पार्वती के पुनर्मिलन के उपलक्ष्य में मनाया जाता है. इस बार हरियाली तीज का ये पर्व 23 जुलाई को है.
#HariyaliTeejKabHai #HariyaliTeej2020 #HariyaliTeej
entry.summary: Hariyali Teej 2020 Date: Typically a festival that is celebrated by women in some of the northern states in the country — like Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar and Jharkhand — Hariyali Teej is one part of the three major teej festivals that is celebrated in the country, the other two being Kajari Teej and Hartalika Teej.According to Drik Panchang, Hariyali Teej falls on the shukla paksha tritiya in the Shravana month, and usually two days before Nag Panchami. This year, it will be celebrated on July 23, which is a Thursday. The days is dedicated to Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, and throughout the month and especially on the day, devotees fast. हरियाली तीज सावन महीने के सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पर्व में से एक है. सौंदर्य और प्रेम के इस पर्व को श्रावणी तीज भी कहते हैं. हरियाली तीज के दिन महिलाएं अपने पति की लम्बी उम्र और सुख समृद्धि के लिए व्रत रखती हैं. इस दिन महिलाएं पूरी श्रद्धा से भगवान शिव-पार्वती की पूजा करती हैं. हरियाली तीज भगवान शिव और मां पार्वती के पुनर्मिलन के उपलक्ष्य में मनाया जाता है. इस बार हरियाली तीज का ये पर्व 23 जुलाई को है. #HariyaliTeejKabHai #HariyaliTeej2020 #HariyaliTeej

entry.title: Jean-Claude Camus, ancien producteur de Johnny Hallyday: ‘Il y a un moment où c’est l’heure du pardon’

link.title: Jean-Claude Camus, ancien producteur de Johnny Hallyday: ‘Il y a un moment où c’est l’heure du pardon’

entry.content: Mercredi, Laura Smet a concédé que des tensions existaient toujours entre Leaticia Hallyday et elle. L’ancien producteur de Johnny Hallyday Jean-Claude Camus a réagi à cette sortie ce jeudi sur BFMTV. "Il y a un moment où c’est l’heure du pardon", a-t-il lancé, estimant qu’il "y a eu assez de polémiques".
entry.summary: Mercredi, Laura Smet a concédé que des tensions existaient toujours entre Leaticia Hallyday et elle. L’ancien producteur de Johnny Hallyday Jean-Claude Camus a réagi à cette sortie ce jeudi sur BFMTV. "Il y a un moment où c’est l’heure du pardon", a-t-il lancé, estimant qu’il "y a eu assez de polémiques".

entry.title: Jessica Biel et Justin Timberlake ont accueilli leur 2e enfant

link.title: Jessica Biel et Justin Timberlake ont accueilli leur 2e enfant

entry.content: C’était l’une des belles surprises du confinement pour le couple de stars. Jessica Biel et Justin Timberlake ont accueilli au début du mois de juillet 2020 dans le plus grand secret leur 2e enfant. Il s’agit d’un garçon, un petit frère pour leur fils aîné Silas âgé de 5 ans.
entry.summary: C’était l’une des belles surprises du confinement pour le couple de stars. Jessica Biel et Justin Timberlake ont accueilli au début du mois de juillet 2020 dans le plus grand secret leur 2e enfant. Il s’agit d’un garçon, un petit frère pour leur fils aîné Silas âgé de 5 ans.

entry.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis में नया मोड़, Sachin Pilot को डिप्टी CM व अध्यक्ष पद से हटाया

link.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis में नया मोड़, Sachin Pilot को डिप्टी CM व अध्यक्ष पद से हटाया

entry.content:
राजस्थान में जारी सियासी संकट का फिलहाल पटाक्षेप हो गया है। कांग्रेस ने सचिन पायलट को डिप्टी सीएम पद से हटाने के साथ ही प्रदेश अध्यक्ष पद से भी हटा दिया है। इसके अलावा पायलट समर्थक विश्वेन्द्रसिंह और रमेश मीणा को भी मंत्री पद से हटा दिया गया है।शिक्षामंत्री गोविंदसिंह डोटासरा अब सचिन पायलट के स्थान पर राजस्थान प्रदेश कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष होंगे।
इस बीच, कांग्रेस नेता रणदीप सुरजेवाला ने भाजपा पर राजस्थान की सरकार को अस्थिर करने का षड़यंत्र रचने का आरोप लगाया। उन्होंने कहा कि धन और सत्ता का दुरुपयोग कर विधायकों को खरीदने की कोशिश की जा रही है। सुरजेवाला ने कहा कि सचिन पायलट और उनके समर्थक भाजपा के जाल में फंस गए। कांग्रेस के कुछ विधायक भी इस साजिश में शामिल हुए।
उन्होंने कहा‍ कि सोनिया गांधी और राहुल गांधी ने सचिन पायलट और उनके समर्थकों से बात की, लेकिन वे नहीं माने। इससे पहले राजधानी जयपुर की फेयरमॉन्ट होटल में कांग्रेस विधायकों की बैठक में विधायकों ने बागी विधायकों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई की मांग की।
इस बैठक में 102 विधायक मौजूद थे, जो‍ कि राजस्थान की 200 सदस्यीय विधानसभा में बहुमत के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।
entry.summary: राजस्थान में जारी सियासी संकट का फिलहाल पटाक्षेप हो गया है। कांग्रेस ने सचिन पायलट को डिप्टी सीएम पद से हटाने के साथ ही प्रदेश अध्यक्ष पद से भी हटा दिया है। इसके अलावा पायलट समर्थक विश्वेन्द्रसिंह और रमेश मीणा को भी मंत्री पद से हटा दिया गया है।शिक्षामंत्री गोविंदसिंह डोटासरा अब सचिन पायलट के स्थान पर राजस्थान प्रदेश कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष होंगे। इस बीच, कांग्रेस नेता रणदीप सुरजेवाला ने भाजपा पर राजस्थान की सरकार को अस्थिर करने का षड़यंत्र रचने का आरोप लगाया। उन्होंने कहा कि धन और सत्ता का दुरुपयोग कर विधायकों को खरीदने की कोशिश की जा रही है। सुरजेवाला ने कहा कि सचिन पायलट और उनके समर्थक भाजपा के जाल में फंस गए। कांग्रेस के कुछ विधायक भी इस साजिश में शामिल हुए। उन्होंने कहा‍ कि सोनिया गांधी और राहुल गांधी ने सचिन पायलट और उनके समर्थकों से बात की, लेकिन वे नहीं माने। इससे पहले राजधानी जयपुर की फेयरमॉन्ट होटल में कांग्रेस विधायकों की बैठक में विधायकों ने बागी विधायकों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई की मांग की। इस बैठक में 102 विधायक मौजूद थे, जो‍ कि राजस्थान की 200 सदस्यीय विधानसभा में बहुमत के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।

entry.title: Komnas PA Sebut Anak Juga Terancam Prostitusi Online

link.title: Komnas PA Sebut Anak Juga Terancam Prostitusi Online

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Apa saja faktor yang memicu orang terdekat, terutama orangtua, melakukan kekerasan terhadap anak? Benarkah hal ini memicu anak nekat melakukan upaya bunuh diri? Serta benarkah media sosial justru memperburuk kondisi anak korban kekerasan?
Kekerasan kepada anak masih terus terjadi. Dan mirisnya, para pelaku kekerasan biasanya adalah orang terdekat, baik itu orangtua maupun anggota keluarga lainnya.
Tidak hanya kekerasan fisik, anak-anak juga rentan mendapat kekerasan seksual.
Adalah hak anak untuk mendapat perlindungan dan kasih sayang, terutama dari anggota keluarganya.
Sebagai pihak yang dianggap lemah, bukan berarti anak bisa diperlakukan dengan semena-mena.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Apa saja faktor yang memicu orang terdekat, terutama orangtua, melakukan kekerasan terhadap anak? Benarkah hal ini memicu anak nekat melakukan upaya bunuh diri? Serta benarkah media sosial justru memperburuk kondisi anak korban kekerasan? Kekerasan kepada anak masih terus terjadi. Dan mirisnya, para pelaku kekerasan biasanya adalah orang terdekat, baik itu orangtua maupun anggota keluarga lainnya. Tidak hanya kekerasan fisik, anak-anak juga rentan mendapat kekerasan seksual. Adalah hak anak untuk mendapat perlindungan dan kasih sayang, terutama dari anggota keluarganya. Sebagai pihak yang dianggap lemah, bukan berarti anak bisa diperlakukan dengan semena-mena. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 10) - Rodney Come Home - Part 1 - 1981

link.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 10) - Rodney Come Home - Part 1 - 1981

entry.content:
Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold.
Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich.
After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald).
The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.
entry.summary: Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold. Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich. After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald). The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.

entry.title: 7 13 2020: Vegas Rollers 24, Orlando Storm 15

link.title: 7 13 2020: Vegas Rollers 24, Orlando Storm 15

entry.content: The Orlando Storm dropped eight of the final nine games against the Vegas Rollers on Monday en route to their first loss of the 2020 season, 24-15.
entry.summary: The Orlando Storm dropped eight of the final nine games against the Vegas Rollers on Monday en route to their first loss of the 2020 season, 24-15.

entry.title: [ENG SUB HD] Knowing Bros Episode 238-3 by KBForYou1 - Sunmi, Zico (Block B), Shownu, Jooheon (Monsta X)

link.title: [ENG SUB HD] Knowing Bros Episode 238-3 by KBForYou1 - Sunmi, Zico (Block B), Shownu, Jooheon (Monsta X)

entry.content:
Hello! We made a sub team for Knowing Brothers
For the latest update find us on twitter @KBForYou1
You can show your support by contributing via paypal here
For Indonesian nationals you can contribute via gopay/ovo/dana/linkaja/shopeepay to this number (0878-5980-3980)
Malaysian nationals can use Touch ‘n Go and Indians can use GooglePay (QR codes are available on our twitter)
Have a nice day~

entry.title: Coronavirus – « Ça va disparaître » : Donald Trump persiste et signe

link.title: Coronavirus – « Ça va disparaître » : Donald Trump persiste et signe

entry.content: Alors que le nombre d’infections au coronavirus flambe aux États-Unis, Donald Trump a défendu ses propos selon lesquels la maladie finirait par «  disparaître ».
entry.summary: Alors que le nombre d’infections au coronavirus flambe aux États-Unis, Donald Trump a défendu ses propos selon lesquels la maladie finirait par « disparaître ».

entry.title: Dâu bể đường trần Tập 2 – Có link tập 3 và trọn bộ bên dưới ** Dâu bể đường trần - ngày 17 07 2020

entry.title: The Instant Gardener episode 8

link.title: The Instant Gardener episode 8

entry.content:
The Instant Gardener episode 8: An unloved garden is brought back to life using clever design and imaginative ideas, all in one day. In Birmingham, the team tackle a wildlife-lover’s neglected and boring backyard. Now that her children are leaving the nest, she wants a garden full of birds, bees and butterflies.
Last gardening post on HDclump.com:
entry.summary: The Instant Gardener episode 8: An unloved garden is brought back to life using clever design and imaginative ideas, all in one day. In Birmingham, the team tackle a wildlife-lover’s neglected and boring backyard. Now that her children are leaving the nest, she wants a garden full of birds, bees and butterflies. Last gardening post on HDclump.com:

entry.title: How To Properly Wash the Dishes

link.title: How To Properly Wash the Dishes

entry.content:
How To Properly Wash the Dishes
Today I show you how to wash your dishes properly. 90% of people wash their dishes incorrectly - Resulting in it taking WAY longer than required. Using these dish washing tips you’ll use 50% less water, as well as it taking half as long to complete. Washing the dishes by hand will no longer be a dreaded task - you’ll enjoy it, and you’ll have peace of mind knowing you are washing them at maximum efficiency.
entry.summary: How To Properly Wash the Dishes Today I show you how to wash your dishes properly. 90% of people wash their dishes incorrectly - Resulting in it taking WAY longer than required. Using these dish washing tips you’ll use 50% less water, as well as it taking half as long to complete. Washing the dishes by hand will no longer be a dreaded task - you’ll enjoy it, and you’ll have peace of mind knowing you are washing them at maximum efficiency.

entry.title: (Munich 2004) Anwar Ibrahim: How Did I Cope With My Life In Prison?

link.title: (Munich 2004) Anwar Ibrahim: How Did I Cope With My Life In Prison?

entry.content: DS Anwar Ibrahim left Malaysia on 04/09/2004 to undergo treatment in Munich, Germany for his spinal condition
entry.summary: DS Anwar Ibrahim left Malaysia on 04/09/2004 to undergo treatment in Munich, Germany for his spinal condition

entry.title: Ellerim Tombik Tombik Çocuk Şarkısı

link.title: Ellerim Tombik Tombik Çocuk Şarkısı

entry.content:
Ellerim tombik tombik, kirlenince ne komik… Efsaneye dönüşen ve temizliği özendiren eğlenceli bir çocuk şarkısı ‘Ellerim tombik tombik’ sizlerle…
Ellerim Tombik Tombik Şarkısı Sözleri:
Ellerim tombik tombik,
Kirlenince ne komik
Kirli eller sevilmez,
Güzelliği görülmez.
Saçlarımız bakım ister,
Hele dişler hele dişler
Uzamasın tırnaklar,
Temizlensin kulaklar.
Bize PİS derler PİS derler
Bize PİS derler PİS derler.
Çok koşup da terleme, soğuk sulardan içme!
Çok koşup da terleme, soğuk sulardan içme
Sonra hasta olursun, koşup doktoru bulursun
Doktor gelir yanına, iğne yapar popona
Ay ay diye bağırma, koşup anneni çağırma.
Resimleyen: Merve Topal
Düzenleme-Animasyon: Halit Küçük
Aranjör: Oğuz Sivri
Proje Koordinatörü: İhsan Aydın
entry.summary: Ellerim tombik tombik, kirlenince ne komik… Efsaneye dönüşen ve temizliği özendiren eğlenceli bir çocuk şarkısı ‘Ellerim tombik tombik’ sizlerle… Ellerim Tombik Tombik Şarkısı Sözleri: Ellerim tombik tombik, Kirlenince ne komik Kirli eller sevilmez, Güzelliği görülmez. Saçlarımız bakım ister, Hele dişler hele dişler Uzamasın tırnaklar, Temizlensin kulaklar. Bize PİS derler PİS derler Bize PİS derler PİS derler. Çok koşup da terleme, soğuk sulardan içme! Çok koşup da terleme, soğuk sulardan içme Sonra hasta olursun, koşup doktoru bulursun Doktor gelir yanına, iğne yapar popona Ay ay diye bağırma, koşup anneni çağırma. Resimleyen: Merve Topal Düzenleme-Animasyon: Halit Küçük Aranjör: Oğuz Sivri Proje Koordinatörü: İhsan Aydın

entry.title: CBSE Board 12th Result 2020 : फिर लड़कियों ने फिर मारी बाजी,92.15 %छात्राएं पास वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: CBSE Board 12th Result 2020 : फिर लड़कियों ने फिर मारी बाजी,92.15 %छात्राएं पास वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
CBSE has released the results of 12th board examination. This time a total of 88.78 percent students have been successful. This year there has been an increase of 5 percent. However, the overall result was won by the girl students. This garden has passed 92.15 percent girls. At the same time this year, the pass percentage of boys was 86.19 percent .. 5.96% more girls than the students, this time the CBSE board has passed 12th.
CBSE ने 12वीं की बोर्ड परीक्षा के नतीजे जारी कर दिए हैं। इस बार कुल 88.78 फीसदी छात्रों को सफलता मिली है। इस साल 5 प्रतिशत का इजाफा हुआ है।हालांकि ओवरऑल रिजल्‍ट में छात्राओं ने बाजी मारी।इस बाग 92.15 फीसदी लड़कियां पास हुई हैं. वहीं इस साल लड़कों का पास प्रतिशत 86.19 फीसदी रहा.. छात्रों के मुकाबले 5.96 % अधिक छात्राएं इस बार सीबीएसई बोर्ड 12वीं में पास हुई हैं।
#CBSEBoard12thResult2020 #CBSE12thResult2020
entry.summary: CBSE has released the results of 12th board examination. This time a total of 88.78 percent students have been successful. This year there has been an increase of 5 percent. However, the overall result was won by the girl students. This garden has passed 92.15 percent girls. At the same time this year, the pass percentage of boys was 86.19 percent .. 5.96% more girls than the students, this time the CBSE board has passed 12th. CBSE ने 12वीं की बोर्ड परीक्षा के नतीजे जारी कर दिए हैं। इस बार कुल 88.78 फीसदी छात्रों को सफलता मिली है। इस साल 5 प्रतिशत का इजाफा हुआ है।हालांकि ओवरऑल रिजल्‍ट में छात्राओं ने बाजी मारी।इस बाग 92.15 फीसदी लड़कियां पास हुई हैं. वहीं इस साल लड़कों का पास प्रतिशत 86.19 फीसदी रहा.. छात्रों के मुकाबले 5.96 % अधिक छात्राएं इस बार सीबीएसई बोर्ड 12वीं में पास हुई हैं। #CBSEBoard12thResult2020 #CBSE12thResult2020
